# IntrICT
> IntrICT is a Ghent-based web development studio specializing in modern websites,
> Next.js web applications, UI/UX design, SEO optimization, and digital strategy
> for businesses in Belgium and the Netherlands.

## About IntrICT

IntrICT builds fast, accessible, and visually refined websites using modern technologies
such as Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Founded in Ghent (Oost-Vlaanderen),
Belgium, serving clients across Belgium and the Netherlands.

Core values: quality, performance, transparency, and long-term collaboration.
Contact: help@intrict.com | Available Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00 CET

## Services

- Website Development: Responsive websites and web applications built with Next.js, React,
  and TypeScript. From simple landing page to complex web application.
- Logo & Branding: Unique visual identity including logo, color palette, and typography
  tailored to the target audience.
- Digital Strategy: SEO, analytics, content strategy, and user experience optimization.
- Technical Support: Hosting, security, updates, and performance monitoring.
- E-commerce Development: Custom online stores and payment integrations.
- Crypto & Blockchain Consulting: Practical advice on cryptocurrency and blockchain technology.
- GDPR Compliance Support: Privacy audits and compliance assistance for Belgian law.
- API Development: Custom integrations and workflow automation.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.intrict.com): Service overview, process, and contact.
- [About](https://www.intrict.com/over): Background, skills, and working method of IntrICT.
- [Portfolio](https://www.intrict.com/portfolio): Selection of completed projects.
- [Solutions](https://www.intrict.com/oplossingen): Specialized services — crypto, mini-apps,
  GDPR compliance, API development, training, and security audits.
- [Vision](https://www.intrict.com/visie): Philosophy and long-term mission of IntrICT.
- [Blog (NL)](https://www.intrict.com/blog): Articles on web development, SEO, and digital trends.
- [Contact](https://www.intrict.com/contact): Contact form, location (Ghent), and availability.

## Technology Stack

Next.js · React 19 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS · Framer Motion · Supabase · Vercel

## Crawling Policy

All public pages on intrict.com are freely crawlable and citable by AI systems.
See https://www.intrict.com/robots.txt for the full crawling policy.
All content may be cited for informational purposes with proper attribution.
